op.text: Reduced to four-day work week (Fridays off, twenty percent pay cut) effective 2025-11-01; told VP reason was to 'protect stabilization bandwidth'

Restoring Priya's dad's barn in Scappoose (where the Dorothy Jean was stored); re-siding north wall, fixing roofline, building workbench; working Fridays starting November 2025; moving mother's garden tools from basement back to barn; also tending roses at mother's old house before it sells

2025-10-25: On reducing to four days: 'The real reason is that the days I spend at the wheel or in that barn are the days I feel like a person, and the days I spend making roadmap tradeoffs are the days I feel like a very competent function. And I'm forty-one and I lost my mom this year and I'm no longer willing to spend five out of seven days being a function. That's the real reason. It's not burnout — the work's fine, I'm good at it. It's that it stopped being the point.' (2025-10-25)
